change_comments.message: As of now -1 till get confirmation from Toine.

@Sean, can we have change the name of this method (setTrustLevelPerDmiPlugin) to populateTrustLevelPerDmiPlugin(...) and form up the order of methods mentioned in my comment below? Then, I'll give +1.

inline_comments.message: I think, populating DMI plugin and cm handle caches have to be done after a successful registration? @Toine, please share your thoughts on this so that we can decide on moving this line to after line 120. Also we should consider moving 'line 118' to after line 120.

The DMI (plugin) trustlevel itself can be set at the start ie. we know the DMI is alive!!!!
but the CM-Handles trustlevel should be set as we process them. I am not sure if the  method being called here does both... Maybe it needs to be split in that case 


think of this scenario: registration can take 20 Minutes!
After 1 minute a few hundred cm handles might be ready and trusted! The user could theoreticaly look for data form them
but if we check the TrustLevel and combine it with the DMI (plugin) trustlevel it wil NOT be trusted which doesn't make sense...

NB: i woulf ahve preferred if you had extracted out something like:
effectiveServiceName = .... ?  ...  : ...
trustLevelPerDmiPLugin.put(effectiveServiceName, TrustLevel.COMPLETE)
